problems.cause: AGREE does not support direct use of AADL 'min' function; it must be defined as an equation or constant
problems.minimal_edit: Replace 'min(gcas_timeToFailure, tcas_timeToFailure, geof_timeToFailure)' with a new equation defining timeToFailure_min as the minimum of the three inputs

problems.cause: AGREE does not support direct use of AADL 'concurrencyFactor' function; it must be defined as an equation or constant
problems.minimal_edit: Replace 'concurrencyFactor(gcas_timeToRecovery, timeToFailure)' with a new equation defining p1 as the result of a logical expression using the inputs

problems.cause: AGREE does not support direct use of AADL 'concurrencyFactor' function; it must be defined as an equation or constant
problems.minimal_edit: Replace 'concurrencyFactor(tcas_timeToRecovery, timeToFailure)' with a new equation defining p2 as the result of a logical expression using the inputs

problems.cause: AGREE does not support direct use of AADL 'concurrencyFactor' function; it must be defined as an equation or constant
problems.minimal_edit: Replace 'concurrencyFactor(geof_timeToRecovery, timeToFailure)' with a new equation defining p3 as the result of a logical expression using the inputs

executor_steps: Replace the min() function call with a new equation that computes the minimum of the three input real values
Replace each concurrencyFactor() function call with a new equation that defines the corresponding boolean output
Ensure all new equations use only visible identifiers from the component type
Update the guarantees to reference the newly defined equations instead of the unresolved functions
